name: societyer-document-intake
description: AI guidance for Societyer document intake, import review bundles, and browser-backed connector operation.

interface.shortDescription: Operate Societyer document intake and browser connectors.
interface.longDescription: Guides an AI through Societyer's document intake surface and browser-backed connector workflows: supported import bundle shapes, privacy gates, live browser login sessions, Wave imports, and connector-runner verification.
defaultPrompt: Map these documents to Societyer import records.
Tell me which fields this document can transpose.
Use the browser connector to inspect or import Wave transactions.
